summary: Layered atlas for the Spec Kit Plus Python CLI, generated workflow surfaces, and bundled Codex team runtime.

root_topics.use_when: Changing major runtime boundaries, contracts, strategy selection, hooks, or delegated execution surfaces.
Finding ownership, placement rules, and generated/cache/build-output boundaries.
Checking naming, state, generated-surface, compatibility, and review conventions.
Changing supported agent adapters, MCP, external tool assumptions, extension/preset catalogs, or runtime seams.
Changing `sp-*` behavior, workflow state, brownfield gates, testing workflows, or implementation/debug flow.
Choosing focused verification for a change surface.
Building, installing, refreshing maps, troubleshooting runtime state, or handling release/local environment issues.
